originalTitle: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
content: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
chineseTitle: 中国 DeepSeek 引发 AI 股大跌
chineseSummary: 美国股市大多走低，其中纳斯达克指数领跌，因为人工智能基础设施制造商的股价大幅下跌，其中许多跌幅达到两位数。英伟达股价下跌 16%。
chineseContent: 美国股市大多走低，其中纳斯达克指数领跌，因为人工智能基础设施制造商的股价大幅下跌，其中许多跌幅达到两位数。英伟达股价下跌 16%。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
